auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to continue making videos
auth.signupSubtitle: Free to start — no credit card required
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.emailExists: An account with this email already exists.
auth.termsPrefix: By signing up, you agree to our

errors.generic: Something went wrong — please try again.
errors.ERR_SCRIPT_GENERATION_FAILED: Script generation failed — please try again.
errors.ERR_SCRIPT_ANALYSIS_FAILED: Scene analysis failed — please try again.
errors.ERR_EPISODE_NOT_DRAFT: Scenes can only be regenerated while the episode is a draft.
errors.ERR_IMAGE_GENERATION_FAILED: Image generation failed — try again or upload manually.
errors.ERR_NO_SERIES: This episode has no series — link it to a series to generate images.
errors.ERR_NO_ASSET_BRIEF: This scene has no missing-image description to generate from.
errors.ERR_YOUTUBE_NOT_CONNECTED: YouTube not connected. Go to Settings → YouTube first.

dashboard.title: Episodes
dashboard.emptyHint: Create your first episode to get started.

episodes.scenesTitle: Scenes — upload an asset image for each
episodes.buildHint: All scenes need an uploaded asset before building.
episodes.rebuildConfirm: This episode is already built. Rebuilding re-runs voice-over for every scene and costs TTS credits. Continue?
episodes.uploadAllHint: Upload assets for all {count} scenes to enable build.
episodes.publishHint: Upload the built video directly to your connected YouTube channel.

script.title: Script
script.briefPlaceholder: Episode idea / brief — a rough idea or a partial script
script.scriptPlaceholder: The full narration script appears here — edit freely before splitting into scenes. You can also paste a finished script directly.
script.splitHint: Splitting replaces the current scene list and matches each scene to your series assets.
script.scriptRequired: Write or generate a script first.

new.title: New episode
new.subtitle: Add scenes to build your episode.
new.titlePlaceholder: What If the Internet Went Dark?

series.title: Series
series.styleBiblePlaceholder: Style bible — describe the visual style used for every generated image (e.g. 'black stick figures on white background, minimal, bold red accents')
series.voicePlaceholder: TTS voice ID (e.g. ElevenLabs voice id — pick after the voice comparison)
series.empty: No series yet. A series holds shared character images, style, and voice for all its episodes.
series.assetDescription: Description — what is in this image (the AI matches scenes by this)
series.assetNameRequired: Asset name is required (the AI matches scenes to assets by name + description).

youtube.title: YouTube
youtube.subtitle: Connect your YouTube channel to publish episodes automatically.
youtube.connectBody: Publish episodes directly to YouTube with one click. You'll be redirected to Google to authorize access.
youtube.infoText: Narro requests upload-only access to your YouTube account. We never read your existing videos or access your account data.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your plan and subscription.
billing.upgradeAlert: Contact us to upgrade to {name}. Stripe integration coming soon.
billing.paymentsFooter: Payments processed securely via Stripe. Cancel anytime.

hero.title: Turn one idea into a whole series
hero.subtitle: AI writes the script, you approve every word. Narro builds the video — consistent characters, voice, and style across every episode — and publishes straight to YouTube.

steps.title: Drop in your idea
steps.body: A rough premise and a target length are enough. Or paste a finished script.

steps.title: AI writes the script — you approve it
steps.body: Narro drafts narration sized to your target duration. Edit every word before anything is produced.

steps.title: Scenes and images, matched automatically
steps.body: The script is split into scenes, matched against your series asset library, and missing images are generated in your series style.

steps.title: Video out, straight to YouTube
steps.body: Voice-over, subtitles, motion and music — rendered server-side and published to your channel in one click.

features.title: Built for series, not one-off clips

items.title: Script-to-length AI
items.body: Tell it 8 minutes, get an 8-minute script — in your series' language and tone.

items.title: Series asset library
items.body: Characters, locations and props live at the series level, so episode 10 looks like episode 1.

items.title: On-brand image generation
items.body: Missing scene images are generated from your series style bible — no prompt engineering.

items.title: Multi-language narration
items.body: Vietnamese and English text-to-speech with a fixed voice per series.

items.title: Subtitles that never mishear
items.body: Captions come from your script, not speech recognition — 100% accurate.

items.title: One-click YouTube publish
items.body: Connect your channel once; every built episode uploads with title, description and tags.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees. No per-minute charges. Just a flat plan that scales with your ambition.
pricing.footnote: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required for Free tier.

free.name: Free
free.description: Start exploring Narro without a credit card.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: For studios and agencies at scale.

cta.title: Your first episode is one idea away
cta.body: Start free, keep every video you make.

footer.tagline: The AI video agent for storytellers.
